chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 632 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 08.11.2022 Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> None present for the petitioner. Through instant Petition, the petitioner seeks declaration that the act of respondents 2 and 3 refusing to issue blank tender form to the petitioner for the works mentioned at Serial No.10/2235 (i), (ii) and (v) in the subject NIT as illegal, mala fide and unconstitutional. The petitioner has the appropriate remedy under SPPRA Rules, 2010, hence this petition being not maintainable is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
